ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "school_type" INTEGER /* Reference to the school type */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled */,
  "total_budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated to the school */,
  "per_student_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated per student */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the school */,
  "principal" TEXT /* Name of the school principal */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the school */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the school */,
  "grades_offered" TEXT /* Range of grades offered by the school */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the school was enrolled in the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_school_type FOREIGN KEY ("school_type") REFERENCES school_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "average_math_score" REAL /* Average math score for the school */,
  "average_reading_score" REAL /* Average reading score for the school */,
  "passing_math_rate" REAL /* Percentage of students passing math */,
  "passing_reading_rate" REAL /* Percentage of students passing reading */,
  "overall_passing_rate" REAL /* Overall passing rate */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the performance metrics are recorded */,
  "subject_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the subjects */,
  "math_score_std_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of math scores */,
  "reading_score_std_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of reading scores */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the school type (e.g., District, Charter) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the school type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school the student is enrolled in */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "enrollment_year" INTEGER /* Year the student enrolled */,
  "grade_level" TEXT /* Current grade level of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the student */,
  "parent_guardian_name" TEXT /* Name of the parent/guardian */,
  "parent_guardian_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the parent/guardian */,
  "parent_guardian_email" TEXT /* Email address of the parent/guardian */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget entry */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school receiving the budget */,
  "budget_amount" REAL /* Amount of budget allocated */,
  "budget_year" INTEGER /* Year the budget is allocated for */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of the budget (e.g., state, federal, local) */,
  "spending_details" TEXT /* Details on how the budget is allocated (e.g., salaries, materials, technology) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test score */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the test (e.g., Math, Reading) */,
  "score" REAL /* Score achieved by the student */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was taken */,
  "grade_level" TEXT /* Grade level of the student when the test was taken */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the teacher who administered the test */,
  "test_version" TEXT /* Version of the test (e.g., A, B) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_scores_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pass_rates" (
  "pass_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pass rate entry */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject for which the pass rate is recorded (e.g., Math, Reading) */,
  "pass_rate" REAL /* Pass rate for the subject */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the pass rate is recorded for */,
  "number_students_tested" INTEGER /* Number of students who took the test */,
  "std_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of pass rates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pass_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pass_rates_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, school leader, financial analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions for the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school the report is about */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Performance, Budget) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path where the report is stored */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final, published) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the report */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)
